title: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching series
display_title: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching series
wikitext:
[]: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching series             Quote Post by V » Wed May 09, 2007 4:27 pm Okay, I first watched the show when it aired on Adult Swim just last year. I've been rewatching it ever since, and I just finished again (plus I watched EoE with friends). Anyway, I'm trying to narrow down a list of "unanswered questions from the series which are what has been fueling the online community for SO LONG after the series ended"..., er, keep in mind that I was a hardcore Lord of the Rings fan before all of this (Psyched about WETA being attached, hopefully) but you know, the equivalent of in 2000 going "in advance, we know that the question of Balrogs having wings or not will be a frequently heard thing we have to address" I'm not asking to nitpick, so much as that when I started watching there was kind of already buzz about the live action films (and Rebuild not long after that)....so I'm kind of more pointing out "what are major questions later productions will have to address from the original?" Anyway, so far I've got it as: 1-the nature of the Angels and where they come from I've read the whole "classified info" thing about First Ancestral Race and junk; Adam and Lilith are two co-equal beings and the other Angels are just Adam's progeny. Still....how do the Angels physically show up where they do? They're "humans that have rejected human form": what, do random people on the street mutate into Angels? Or are they made from "seeds" of some sort from Adam? 2-The Katsuragi Expedition As I understand it, the White Moon (White Egg? Which is it?) is the equivalent of the Black Moon Tokyo-3 was built over; it's another Geofront. Adam came to Earth in it. Why did the Katsuragi Expedition apparently intentioanlly wake up Adam from a dormant state? To lessen the affect of Third Impact? BUt Third Impact never would have happened if Adam had never been reawoken. Plus, I've seen that production still of Adam impaled on the Lance of Longinus, as if he lost a fight with Lilith or something; is that a fair assessment? ------->Just how much did they already know about Angels and AT fields and such? Okay, "the secret Dead Sea Scrolls prophesied the Angels"; I'm willing to take that as a given with no higher explanation. --------->The Lance of Longinus: where did they get it? I know it came WITH one of them, either Adam or Lilith; but where did they FIND it? Was it impaled in Adam? The deleted scenes say that they were shipping it *to* Antarctica from the Dead Sea.....did they find it there? And what were they trying to DO to Adam exactly? "Inject him with human DNA" or something? (I'm not sure what, I have to rewatch) 3-Lilith Lilith is the source of all "normal" life on Earth; her LCL blood formed the primordial soup from which terrestrial life formed, ultimately resulting in humans. ***did they just....FIND Lilith under Hakone, and build Tokyo-3 around her? How the HECK did they manage to restrain her on a crucifix like that? And how do you keep something THAT big a secret? 4-Rei What exactly....IS Rei? A clone of Yui Ikari mixed with Lilith DNA? More importantly.....what the heck is her PURPOSE? (see below) 5-Kaworu Okay, Kaworu is SEELE's equivalent of Rei. Just as Rei is the vessel for Lilith's soul, Kaworu/Tabris is the vessl of Adam's soul. how the heck do they have the technology to separate souls like that? Or to take the soul of the dead Rei II and put it into Rei III? Or is "Rei III" based on a mental template they took of Rei II when she was in the long-glass-tube? 6-Eva Unit 01/how are Evas built? Okay, the other Evas were built as basically clones of Adam (the failed prototypes showing their early attempts)...and I can imagine them just taking Adam DNA samples and growing the Evas in gigantic vats.....but what about how Eva Unit 01 was built? I've seen that production still of it basically tearing its way off of Lilith in a mockery of normal birth; what does that frame MEAN? And why did they bother making an Eva of Lilith? And why only make ONE of Lilith? 7-Who shot Kaji I'm willing to accept that it was just one side or the other; Kaji worked for the Japanese government, trying to assert itself over NERV, and at the same time doublecrossing them for SEELE while in turn double-whammy crossing SEELE....in effect, he was VAGUELY working for the Japanese government but really just out for the answers for himself. Ultimately his research lives on with the chip he gave to Misato, letting her find out the truth. --->so he had pissed off both NERV *and* SEELE. Either side may have killed him. Gendo may or may not have personally killed him. Some say Misato killed him; I think this is disproven, as 1-he wasn't shot with her gun (as seen in the manga) 2-there really wasn't enough time 3-she used to research to find out more about NERV as well, so that would be at cross-purposes. 8-Whose soul is in Eva Unit 00? Of course; Evas apparently need a human soul, preferably of the mother of the pilot to work (Toji's mother is dead, and it is quite possible her soul is in Eva Unit 03). As Rei has no mother....she was born in a vat....whose soul is in Unit 00? It may not have HAD a sould, explaining why it is so "buggy", but I think they pretty well establish that Evas need souls. The other 2 big theories I heard (just narrowing down the field) are that it may have been the sould of Rei I (killed by Naoko) or the soul of Naoko Akagi; they do seem to say that the identity of who it tries to attack; Gendo, Ritsuko, and Rei II, are clues to its real identity. Any other theories? 9-Where does SEELE come from? I've narrowed it down to: They're an ancient organization akin to the Illuminati, existing since biblical time as the REAL global power calbal, *OR*, that they are at the least a power cabal which sprung up after World War II. They certainly existed before Second Impact, and from the Dead Sea Scrolls, knew of the Angels coming. 10-Why did Fuyutsuki join GEHIRN? He made it clear that he would be erased if he tried to leave. And he was investigating them; is it that Gendo was actually fond of his old mentor and thus wanted to keep him alive by offering that he join him? He was also a brilliant scientist, plus he wanted to see Yui again. But why did Fuyutsuki basically just go along with Gendo's plan so willingly? At the start of episode 21 he starts off as basically in the same position as the viewer, knowing nothing about the Angels and Evas, and then going "my god, *you* started Second Impact! WHY?"....and then we later have him not trying to stop Gendo at all. What changed his mind? 11--Biggest question: the nature of Third Impact It is apparent that there is more than one VERSION of "Third Impact", with varying results. Basically, I believe it is: 1--SEELE's version: Everyone reverts to a Sea of LCL, and merges into a hyper-being in the next stage of evolution 2-Gendo's version -- Involves him reuniting with Yui. So different from SEELE's version they went to war with NERV to stop him. 3-The Angel's version 4-The version that ACTUALLY HAPPENED Okay, SEELE's plan was a bit more obvious because it *nearly* happened; turn everyone into a Sea of LCL. **I BELIEVE, correct me on this, that the plan failed; Shinji *Rejected* instrumenatlity, and thus "the version that Actually Happened" was none of these things; everyone reverted to LCL and one being, but BEFORE they could evolve to a higher plane or whatever, Shinji stopped it. Gendo's plan: he wanted to be reunited with Yui. This may, or may not, have meant that he would be the new god of Third Impact, directing it by merging with Rei/Lilith and then Unit 01? Or....it might not have involved the Sea of LCL at all. Gendo's version may actually have been LESS destructive, because it totally avoided SEELE's plan. As Gendo's plan is ultimately rejected by Rei in favor of giving Shinji the choice, it's not entirely clear what he was planning. Which is it? ****And why the heck was Gendo so determined to join with SEELE before and DURING Second Impact, if only to later have it that Gendo's ONLY goal is to bring back Yui, SEELE be damned? Was Yui being absorbed into Unit 01....done on PURPOSE? I thought it was an accident, similar to what happened to Shinji in episode 20. She seemed to know what she was doing. Of course, Yui's plan in all of this was to join with Eva so that A-she could throw a monkey-wrench into SEELE's plans, and ensure humanity's survival and B-live on in Eva 01 in space as an eternal testament that humanity existed (okay.....) The Angel's plan for Third Impact : well at first i just though "They all want to return to Adam" (why did they leave in the first place?!) but I've also read that "some wanted to return to Adam, some wanted to join with Lilith, and some were actually mindless with no real goal" ******************** At any rate: what is required for each version? Apparently the Angel-version of an Angel joining with Adam would destroy mankind by ushering in an Instrumentality centered around Angels. Would an Angel joining with Lilith have been any different? (I.e. Tabris) Apparently, Kaworu although an Angel grew to like humanity so much that he felt they didn't deserve to die but he should instead, right? (Kaworu died for our sins...) Okay, basic ingredients for Third Impact are: Adam Lilith Lance of Longinus (original) Eva Unit 01 Rei And these come in various combinations. I.e. if Lilith was gone they could use the Lilith-derived Eva Unit 01 "in a pinch" as it were. ....so why did they even need Rei? (well rather, why did Gendo? Why did it have to be a clone of Yui? WHY?!) ****Why did Third Impact even need to take place? Who was SEELE to decide that humanity had reached an evolutionary dead end? 12 --What happened to Asuka? We never actually see Asuka's dead body, nor do we see a ghostly Rei appearing to her as she did to Misato and Ritsuko (for that matter...how the heck was Rei able to visit people even BEFORE Third Impact started?) I don't agree with the "she's a gestalt Asuka/Rei/Misato at the end" theory; her eyes are different colors just because of ambient lighting (they're next to a orange sea of tang, guys) Regardless.................. Will Asuka and Shinji have a relatively happy ending and go on living? That's the question, isn't it? I mean they're basically stuck as the new Adam and Eve or whatever. Will they start being nice to each other again? I mean Asuka had me going with that caress of his face, and then "kamochi warui" "in the coldest voice imaginable...." (sigh) Then again, at the beginning of EoE Shinji said that all he really wanted was for Asuka to be awake again and telling him he was an idiot, and he basically got his wish :) Well, I hope they're alright.

[]: Re: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching serie             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed May 09, 2007 4:52 pm 1-the nature of the Angels and where they come from The only one we see a full life-cycle for is Sandalophn, which hatches from an egg in the vent of Asamayama. Working hypothesis is that they were scattered in the explosion of 2nd Impact. As Adamic beings, they can't be Lilim. 2-The Katsuragi Expedition The intent is not clear -- and there may have been hidden agendas at work. K-hakase was mainly interested in the S^2; Keel in furthering his schemes. The "duel of the seeds" idea is contradicted by the CI. 3-Lilith "did they just....FIND Lilith under Hakone, and build Tokyo-3 around her?" Yes; she must have been dormant; and you keep it a secret by controlling access. Most of the GeoFront is pre-human in origin. 4-Rei Lilith embodied in the result of salvaging Yui from a meltdown like Shinji in ep 20. 5-Kaworu Applied metabiology 6-Eva Unit 01/how are Evas built? pass 7-Who shot Kaji Random SEELE undercover operative, performing the human sacrifice. 8-Whose soul is in Eva Unit 00? An aspect of Lilith (see ep #14 - Shinji's cross-synch experiment) 9-Where does SEELE come from? Like most illuminated groups, they've probably muddied the waters enough that they could be either. 10-Why did Fuyutsuki join GEHIRN? "You can leave off being a doctor and play with the state of the art research gear. Or be killed. Your choice." Plus, Yui had him wrapped around her little finger. And by the time he was in deep enough, he realises that all he can do is ride the wave and hope to help steer the inevitable Third Impact looming in the near future. 11--Biggest question: the nature of Third Impact Yes - more conflicting agendas. And not a lot of hard data, just surmise. Gendo's plan involved using the Evas as some sort of refuge during the calamity, and then presumably, re-embodying. Yui knew what she was doing -- check back on her conversations by the waterside with Kozo in 21' and 26' The basic initiator for 3I seems to be Adam/Lilith fusion. Rei was the vessel of Lilith's soul; the whole GNR/Shekinah erupts when Adam and Lilith are united, body and souls together. 3I's inevitablity -- while Adamic and Lilim life-forms tried to co-exist, the fusion was just amatter of time. 12 --What happened to Asuka? She died; then re-embodied. Regardless.................. Will Asuka and Shinji have a relatively happy ending and go on living? That's the question, isn't it? There's a (locked) thread about that : http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2458 "I mean they're basically stuck as the new Adam and Eve or whatever." Hmm...

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Wed May 09, 2007 5:05 pm ^ That was a glorious post. Regardless..................Will Asuka and Shinji have a relatively happy ending and go on living? That's the question, isn't it? I mean they're basically stuck as the new Adam and Eve or whatever. Will they start being nice to each other again? I mean Asuka had be going with that caress of his face, and then "kamochi warui" "in the coldest voice imaginable...." (sigh)

[]: Re: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching serie             Quote Post by marmotgirl » Wed May 09, 2007 5:14 pm Mr. Tines wrote: the whole GNR/Shekinah erupts when Adam and Lilith are united, body and souls together.

[]: Re: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching serie             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Wed May 09, 2007 5:16 pm Mr. Tines wrote: 4-Rei Lilith embodied in the result of salvaging Yui from a meltdown like Shinji in ep 20.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed May 09, 2007 5:20 pm Yes, yes, I know. Plus I guess the first step is Asuka and Shinji *wanting* to be happy. I just really think we should get an Epilogue scene or something; well, here comes Rebuild, so I guess that out to do it. I mean I agree with the artistic/stylistic choice "leave it up to Fate and the viewer's imagination" but still.....is it so much to ask for a happy ending? Well rather, that the point of the story is Asuka and Shinji trying to overcome their problems, and they KIND of do, but we never see then acting on these changes. Asuka doesn't really get time to address the fact that she has finally come to terms with her mother's "death", and Shinji did stop the end of the world because he DID want a world with people, but we don't see the result. When you think about it the primary cast is kind of small (I consider the characters we "actually care about" to be just Shinji, Misato, and Asuka). The Nerv techies got a LOT to do in EoE relative to everything they had done before and you just go "I wish we had known these people better than we did". The "duel of the seeds" idea is contradicted by the CI.

[]: Re: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching serie             Quote Post by marmotgirl » Wed May 09, 2007 5:21 pm Opteron-O3 wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: 4-Rei Lilith embodied in the result of salvaging Yui from a meltdown like Shinji in ep 20.

[]: Re: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching serie             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed May 09, 2007 5:23 pm marmotgirl wrote: But isn't Adam's *soul* still in that decapitated corpse

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed May 09, 2007 5:27 pm I dont' know; for such a central character we BARELY see Yui. A lot is IMPLIED about her, and that she actually in the grand scheme of things had as much of an impact on the Eva project and ultimately, Instrumentality as Gendo did; she was the one who outsmarted both SEELE and even Gendo after a fashion. The conversation between Fuyutuski and Yui under the tree is fascinating though, if only too brief; basically saying she foresaw EVERYTHING IN THE ENTIRE SERIES and planned accordingly. And again, Fuyutsuki just goes along with it as he sees no other option? And again....was there REALLY an evolutionary dead end, justifiying Second Impact and the Instrumentality plan? Because...in the grand scheme of things...didn't Shinji reject Instrumentality....thus making Second Impact.....well, unnecessary? Meanwhile..... how can Kaworu be both "a vessel for the soul of Adam" and yet also "the 17th Angel, Tabris" in his own right? Did he have two souls inside of himself? One Adam, one Tabris?

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Wed May 09, 2007 5:35 pm V wrote: I dont' know; for such a central character we BARELY see Yui. A lot is IMPLIED about her, and that she actually in the grand scheme of things had as much of an impact on the Eva project and ultimately, Instrumentality as Gendo did; she was the one who outsmarted both SEELE and even Gendo after a fashion. The conversation between Fuyutuski and Yui under the tree is fascinating though, if only too brief; basically saying she foresaw EVERYTHING IN THE ENTIRE SERIES and planned accordingly. And again, Fuyutsuki just goes along with it as he sees no other option? And again....was there REALLY an evolutionary dead end, justifiying Second Impact and the Instrumentality plan? Because...in the grand scheme of things...didn't Shinji reject Instrumentality....thus making Second Impact.....well, unnecessary? Meanwhile..... how can Kaworu be both "a vessel for the soul of Adam" and yet also "the 17th Angel, Tabris" in his own right? Did he have two souls inside of himself? One Adam, one Tabris?

[]: Re: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching serie             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed May 09, 2007 5:37 pm Opteron-O3 wrote: But instead of giving Yui's soul and original form back like it happened to Shinji. Lilith and Yui switched souls

[]:             Quote Post by marmotgirl » Wed May 09, 2007 5:37 pm V wrote: Well rather, that the point of the story is Asuka and Shinji trying to overcome their problems, and they KIND of do, but we never see then acting on these changes. Asuka doesn't really get time to address the fact that she has finally come to terms with her mother's "death", and Shinji did stop the end of the world because he DID want a world with people, but we don't see the result.

[]: Re: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching serie             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed May 09, 2007 5:40 pm Mr. Tines wrote: 8-Whose soul is in Eva Unit 00? An aspect of Lilith (see ep #14 - Shinji's cross-synch experiment)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed May 09, 2007 5:41 pm marmotgirl wrote: Personally - if we localise it to Tokyo-3 - I think a lot of it depends on how much infrastructure still exists.

[]: Re: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching serie             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Wed May 09, 2007 5:44 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Opteron-O3 wrote: But instead of giving Yui's soul and original form back like it happened to Shinji. Lilith and Yui switched souls

[]:             Quote Post by marmotgirl » Wed May 09, 2007 5:49 pm Mr. Tines wrote: They've had practise at salvaging such things -- they went through the drill with Rei not that long before.

[]:             Quote Post by marmotgirl » Wed May 09, 2007 5:53 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Whatever was left after ReiII did the big firework, and after the N2 drop to shatter the lid of the GeoFront, would have been sloughed off when the Black Moon rose.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed May 09, 2007 6:04 pm marmotgirl wrote: I can see future generations venerating Asuka as a Warrior/Fertility Goddess, oddly enough

[]:             Quote Post by marmotgirl » Wed May 09, 2007 6:08 pm Mr. Tines wrote: marmotgirl wrote: I can see future generations venerating Asuka as a Warrior/Fertility Goddess, oddly enough

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Wed May 09, 2007 6:56 pm marmotgirl wrote: V wrote: Meanwhile..... how can Kaworu be both "a vessel for the soul of Adam" and yet also "the 17th Angel, Tabris" in his own right? Did he have two souls inside of himself? One Adam, one Tabris?

At the start of episode 21 he starts off as basically in the same position as the viewer, knowing nothing about the Angels and Evas, and then going "my god, *you* started Second Impact! WHY?"....and then we later have him not trying to stop Gendo at all. What changed his mind? 11--Biggest question: the nature of Third Impact It is apparent that there is more than one VERSION of "Third Impact", with varying results. Basically, I believe it is: 1--SEELE's version: Everyone reverts to a Sea of LCL, and merges into a hyper-being in the next stage of evolution 2-Gendo's version -- Involves him reuniting with Yui. Or....it might not have involved the Sea of L

Article: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching series
 with Yui. This may, or may not, have meant that he would be the new god of Third Impact, directing it by merging with Rei/Lilith and then Unit 01? Or....it might not have involved the Sea of LCL at all. Gendo's version may actually have been LESS destructive, because it totally avoided SEELE's plan. As Gendo's plan is ultimately rejected by Rei in favor of giving Shinji the choice, it's not entirely clear what he was planning. Which is it? ****And why the heck was Gendo so determined to join with SEELE before and DURING Second Impact, if only to later have it that Gendo's ONLY goal is to bring back Yui, SEELE be damned? Was Yui being absorbed into Unit 01....done on PURPOSE? I thought it was an accident, similar to what happened to Shinji in episode 20. She seemed to know what she was doing. Of course, Yui's plan in all of this was to join with Eva so that A-she could throw a monkey-wrench into SEELE's plans, and ensure humanity's survival and B-live on in Eva 01 in space as an eternal testament that humanity existed (okay.....) The Angel's plan for Third Impact : well at first i just though "They all want to return to Adam" (why did they leave in the first place?!) but I've also read that "some wanted to return to Adam, some wanted to join with Lilith, and some were actually mindless with no real goal" ******************** At any rate: what is required for each version? Apparently the Angel-version of an Angel joining with Adam would destroy mankind by ushering in an Instrumentality centered around Angels. Would an Angel joining with Lilith have been any different? (I.e. Tabris) Apparently, Kaworu although an Angel grew to like humanity so much that he felt they didn't deserve to die but he should instead, right? (Kaworu died for our sins...) Okay, basic ingredients for Third Impact are: Adam Lilith Lance of Longinus (original) Eva Unit 01 Rei And these come in various combinations. I.e. if Lilith was gone they could use the Lilith-derived Eva Unit 01 "in a pinch" as it were. ....so why did they even need Rei? (well rather, why did Gendo? Why did it have to be a clone of Yui? WHY?!) ****Why did Third Impact

Article: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching series
 Unit 01 "in a pinch" as it were. ....so why did they even need Rei? (well rather, why did Gendo? Why did it have to be a clone of Yui? WHY?!) ****Why did Third Impact even need to take place? Who was SEELE to decide that humanity had reached an evolutionary dead end? 12 --What happened to Asuka? We never actually see Asuka's dead body, nor do we see a ghostly Rei appearing to her as she did to Misato and Ritsuko (for that matter...how the heck was Rei able to visit people even BEFORE Third Impact started?) I don't agree with the "she's a gestalt Asuka/Rei/Misato at the end" theory; her eyes are different colors just because of ambient lighting (they're next to a orange sea of tang, guys) Regardless.................. Will Asuka and Shinji have a relatively happy ending and go on living? That's the question, isn't it? I mean they're basically stuck as the new Adam and Eve or whatever. Will they start being nice to each other again? I mean Asuka had me going with that caress of his face, and then "kamochi warui" "in the coldest voice imaginable...." (sigh) Then again, at the beginning of EoE Shinji said that all he really wanted was for Asuka to be awake again and telling him he was an idiot, and he basically got his wish :) Well, I hope they're alright.

 interested in the S^2; Keel in furthering his schemes. The "duel of the seeds" idea is contradicted by the CI. 3-Lilith "did they just....FIND Lilith under Hakone, and build Tokyo-3 around her?" An aspect of Lilith (see ep #14 - Shinji's cross-synch experiment) 9-Where does SEELE come from? Like most illuminated groups, they've probably muddied the waters enough that they could be either. 10-Why did Fuyutsuki join GEHIRN? "You can leave off being a doctor and play with the state of the art research gear. Or be killed. Your choice." Plus, Yui had him wrapped around her little finger. And by the time he was in deep enough, he realises that all he can do is ride the wave and hope to help steer the inevitable Third Impact looming in the near future. 11--Biggest question: the nature of Third Impact Yes - more conflicting agendas. And not a lot of hard data, just surmise. Gendo's plan involved using the Evas as some sort of refuge during the calamity, and then presumably, re-embodying. Yui knew what she was doing -- check back on her conversations by the waterside with Kozo in 21' and 26' The basic initiator for 3I seems to be Adam/Lilith fusion. Rei was the vessel of Lilith's soul; the whole GNR/Shekinah erupts when Adam and Lilith are united, body and souls together. 3I's inevitablity -- while Adamic and Lilim life-forms tried to co-exist, the fusion was just amatter of time. 12 --What happened to Asuka? Article: Questions from a noob who just finished rewatching series
leave it up to Fate and the viewer's imagination" but still.....is it so much to ask for a happy ending? Well rather, that the point of the story is Asuka and Shinji trying to overcome their problems, and they KIND of do, but we never see then acting on these changes. Asuka doesn't really get time to address the fact that she has finally come to terms with her mother's "death", and Shinji did stop the end of the world because he DID want a world with people, but we don't see the result. When you think about it the primary cast is kind of small (I consider the characters we "actually care about" to be just Shinji, Misato, and Asuka). The Nerv techies got a LOT to do in EoE relative to everything they had done before and you just go "I wish we had known these people better than we did". The "duel of the seeds" idea is contradicted by the CI.
